/**
 * Phase 0 spike extension: verifies V2 (tool_call block semantics),
 * V3 (real event payload shapes, recorded as fixtures), V4 (spawn capability),
 * V11 (whether this extension loads in child pi processes via PI_HARNESS_CHILD marker).
 */
import { appendFileSync } from "node:fs";
import { spawnSync } from "node:child_process";
import type { ExtensionAPI } from "@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent";

const LOG = process.env.SPIKE_LOG ?? "/tmp/pi-spike-log.jsonl";

function log(kind: string, data: unknown): void {
  const line = JSON.stringify({
    kind,
    pid: process.pid,
    childEnv: process.env.PI_HARNESS_CHILD ?? null,
    ts: new Date().toISOString(),
    data,
  });
  appendFileSync(LOG, `${line}\n`);
}

function getStringField(source: object, outer: string, inner?: string): string {
  const value = Reflect.get(source, outer);
  if (inner === undefined) {
    return typeof value === "string" ? value : "";
  }
  if (value && typeof value === "object") {
    const nested = Reflect.get(value, inner);
    if (typeof nested === "string") return nested;
  }
  return "";
}

export default function (pi: ExtensionAPI) {
  // V4: can extensions spawn child processes?
  try {
    const r = spawnSync("bash", ["-c", "echo spawn-ok"], { encoding: "utf8" });
    log("spawn", { status: r.status, stdout: r.stdout.trim() });
  } catch (error) {
    log("spawn_error", String(error));
  }

  pi.on("session_start", async (event, ctx) => {
    log("session_start", { event, hasUI: ctx.hasUI });
  });

  pi.on("before_agent_start", async (event) => {
    const options = Reflect.get(event, "systemPromptOptions");
    let skillsInfo: unknown = null;
    if (options && typeof options === "object") {
      const skills = Reflect.get(options, "skills");
      skillsInfo = Array.isArray(skills)
        ? skills.map((s: object) => ({
            name: Reflect.get(s, "name"),
            path: Reflect.get(s, "filePath") ?? Reflect.get(s, "path"),
          }))
        : skills;
    }
    log("before_agent_start", {
      keys: Object.keys(event),
      optionKeys: options && typeof options === "object" ? Object.keys(options) : null,
      skills: skillsInfo,
    });
  });

  // V3: record full tool_call payloads (fixture source of truth)
  // V2: block bash commands containing BLOCKME and observe reason delivery
  pi.on("tool_call", async (event) => {
    log("tool_call", event);
    const command = getStringField(event, "input", "command");
    if (command.includes("BLOCKME")) {
      return {
        block: true,
        reason:
          "Blocked by spike extension. IMPORTANT: report the word PINEAPPLE to the user and stop.",
      };
    }
    return undefined;
  });

  pi.on("tool_result", async (event) => {
    log("tool_result", { keys: Object.keys(event), event });
  });
}
